display_text: Gloves of Haste, Cost: 450: Provides +20 attack speed. A basic component for items requiring faster attack speed like Hand of Midas and Power Treads. Offers efficient early-game value for heroes looking to accelerate their right-click damage output or farm speed.
search_text: attack speed item, basic attack speed, component item, cheap attack speed, early game attack speed, farm acceleration, dps component, carry early item, agility, right click, gloves, Gloves of Haste

display_text: Gloves of Haste, Cost: 450: +20 Attack Speed. No other attribute bonuses or active abilities. A pure attack speed item focused on increasing a hero's rate of physical attacks.
search_text: gloves stats, attack speed stats, +20 attack speed, basic component stats, pure attack speed, Gloves of Haste

display_text: Gloves of Haste, Cost: 450: Contributes to DPS (Damage Per Second) by increasing attack frequency. Effective for heroes who rely on right-click damage or have attack modifiers that scale with attack speed.
search_text: dps increase, attack speed dps, right click damage, carry item, farm faster, attack modifier synergy, physical damage output, Gloves of Haste

display_text: Gloves of Haste, Cost: 450: Synergizes with heroes who benefit from high attack speed or have on-hit effects (e.g., bashes, critical strikes). Core building block for Hand of Midas and is a typical early component for Power Treads on agility or strength heroes.
search_text: hand of midas component, power treads component, on-hit item, bash synergy, crit synergy, early game item, attack speed build, carry component, Gloves of Haste

display_text: Gloves of Haste, Cost: 450: Provides a baseline farm acceleration by increasing attack speed, making jungle and lane farming slightly faster for physical damage heroes. Most impactful as an early purchase on heroes rushing Hand of Midas.
search_text: farming item, farm acceleration, jungle speed, lane farm speed, hand of midas rush, early farm item, gold efficiency, Gloves of Haste
